_comment: TEMPLATE. Copy to data/creds/<program-slug>.json to enable AUTHENTICATED IDOR/RBAC testing for that program. autohunt tells the hunter this file exists; it reads it, authenticates as the accounts below, and proves cross-user / cross-role access. You need >=2 accounts to demonstrate a boundary crossing. data/ is gitignored — never commit real credentials.
notes: How to authenticate: e.g. POST {email,password} to /api/login, then send the returned token as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'. Note any MFA/SSO/captcha quirks, and which account is lower-privileged.
